OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-09-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Plaintiff Mr. Dipak Patel appears on his own behalf, Hope L. Greehill appears as limited scope counsel for the defendant Mr. Jose Larin who is also present.

Settlement conference is held. Matter is settled with the assistance of Judge Begert.

Trial date is vacated.
